title: Brazilian Bean Bake
description: A hearty, comforting dish that's perfect for a cold evening. This Brazilian-inspired bean bake combines the sweetness of Maillard-seasoned beans with the flaky crust of a crispy bake.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the Maillard, Brazilian beans, onion, garlic, and chili flakes.
Roll out the flaky and place in a baking dish.
Pour the bean mixture over the flaky.
Sprinkle the shredded bake on top.
Drizzle with a little water and cover with foil.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
